title: Design Review: triage 8 implementation gaps before coding
description:
Evaluation of design docs (.agent-workspace/docs/) identified 8 gaps/bugs that should be resolved before implementation begins. Issues #2-#13 depend on decisions made here.

## Items to triage (user decisions needed)

### G1 — Migration test assertion bug [BUG]
Design doc §5.3 (line ~599): test asserts cursor value is empty string after migration 11->12, but migration uses DEFAULT NULL. Test would fail.
FIX: assert cursor.getString(0) is null, not empty string.
DECISION: Accept fix as-is?

### G2 — getCalendarIdsAsList() conflates NULL and empty [DESIGN GAP]
Helper returns emptyList() for both null (not configured -> fallback) and empty string (explicitly show nothing). Adapter in §3.3 accesses calendars field directly to distinguish, which contradicts D.6/M4 rule (all reads through helper).
FIX OPTIONS: (a) Add isCalendarsConfigured(): Boolean = calendars != null alongside helper. (b) Return sealed type (overkill).
DECISION: Which option?

### G3 — Birthday/anniversary filtering with overrideCalendarIds [AMBIGUITY]
getEventsSync reads birthday/anniversary calendar IDs at top (lines 464-465). When overrideCalendarIds is non-null, doc says skip global filter entirely, but does not specify whether special birthday/anniversary handling is also skipped.
DECISION: If user selects only Work calendar, should birthday events appear? (Current doc: widget selection wins = only Work events shown.)

### G4 — Save button race condition in WidgetListConfigureActivity [BUG RISK]
Design initializes mSelectedCalendars from Room in ensureBackgroundThread, but saveConfig() could fire before background read completes. User opens existing widget, immediately taps save -> saves empty set instead of existing config.
FIX OPTIONS: (a) Disable save button until Room read completes. (b) Use flag/latch to gate saveConfig().
DECISION: Which option?

### G5 — Re-configuration back press may cancel existing widget [BUG RISK]
WidgetListConfigureActivity sends RESULT_CANCELED on back press to cancel initial widget placement. On re-configuration (existing widget), back press with RESULT_CANCELED should not affect the existing widget, but this is unverified.
FIX: In onBackPressed, check if widget already exists in Room. If yes, just finish() without setResult(CANCELED).
DECISION: Accept fix as-is?

### G6 — Handoff doc remaining tasks [HOUSEKEEPING]
4 must-do items from handoff.md remain: D.7 summary table, D.2-D.5 deferred notes, Appendix C conflict update, final consistency pass.
DECISION: Do these before implementation starts, or batch with implementation?

### G7 — setupIntent may not carry widgetId [VERIFICATION NEEDED]
Design calls setupIntent(context, views, CONFIGURE_WIDGET, R.id.widget_event_configure) for settings gear. Need to verify existing setupIntent includes EXTRA_APPWIDGET_ID in PendingIntent extras. If not, onReceive won't get correct widget ID.
DECISION: Verify at implementation time or add explicit note to design doc?

### G8 — No formal implementation plan [PROCESS]
Handoff lists 12 steps with no dependency graph, estimates, or checkpoints. Steps have hidden dependencies (e.g. migration before adapter, drawable before provider).
DECISION: Create plan before coding, or use handoff order as-is?

## Recommended triage flow
1. Quick wins: G1 (test fix), G5 (back press), G7 (verification note) -> Accept
2. Design decisions: G2, G3, G4 -> Discuss
3. Process: G6, G8 -> Decide timing
